title: Raccoon Removal in Whitestone, Queens | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Whitestone, Queens. Safe, humane extraction from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Whitestone's tree-lined streets and proximity to the waterfront create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and garages. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Whitestone, protecting your home from these destructive wildlife intruders. Our humane removal methods ensure safe extraction and prevention of future raccoon problems.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Whitestone residents, with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges posed by raccoons in Queens neighborhoods. We offer same-day emergency service, humane trapping, complete sanitization, and exclusion work to keep raccoons out permanently.
localContext: Whitestone's mix of single-family homes near Francis Lewis Park and multi-family residences along 150th Street frequently experience raccoon activity, especially during nesting season. The area's mature trees and proximity to the East River provide abundant food sources that attract raccoons to residential properties throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Whitestone?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Whitestone typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of nesting areas, and extent of damage repair needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Whitestone home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Whitestone for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trapping and removal typically takes 1-3 days, though complete exclusion and repair work may take up to a week depending on the complexity of the infestation and entry points.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health risks as they may carry rabies, roundworm, and other diseases. They can also become aggressive when cornered or protecting their young. Additionally, raccoons cause significant property damage by tearing insulation, damaging electrical wiring, and contaminating areas with feces and urine.

faqs.question: Do you offer prevention services after removing raccoons?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our comprehensive service includes sealing all entry points with heavy-duty materials, installing chimney caps, reinforcing vulnerable areas, and providing attic cleanup and sanitization. We also offer warranties on our exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your Whitestone property.
